narrative:
Precinct New Phila 4-C (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 1,042 registered voters, with 50.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
